cars.title: 1967 Chevrolet Corvette Stingray
cars.description: Stunning numbers-matching 1967 Stingray in Tuxedo Black. Features a 427/435hp V8 engine with a 4-speed manual transmission. Fully restored to absolute concours standards. A true classic collector's dream.

cars.title: 1973 Porsche 911 Carrera RS
cars.description: An legendary lightweight masterpiece. Finished in Grand Prix White with Viper Green lettering. Matching numbers 2.7L flat-six engine. Meticulously maintained with full historical documentation.

cars.title: 1965 Shelby Cobra 427 S/C
cars.description: Exquisite Shelby Cobra finished in iconic Guardsman Blue with Wimbledon White stripes. Powered by a thunderous 427ci V8 engine. Side pipes, chrome roll bar, and pristine leather interior. Fast, loud, and breathtaking.

cars.title: 1969 Ford Mustang Boss 429
cars.description: Ultra-rare, highly coveted Boss 429. Finished in Royal Maroon. Fully documented history, numbers-matching powertrain. This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of the classic American muscle era.

cars.title: 1971 Datsun 240Z Series I
cars.description: Exceptional Series I 240Z project candidate. Sourced from dry indoor storage. Minimal surface rust, complete matching-numbers L24 engine, and 4-speed manual gearbox. Perfect for a highly rewarding ground-up restoration or a custom performance restomod project.

cars.title: 1968 Dodge Charger R/T 440
cars.description: Ultimate muscle project! Authentic 1968 Dodge Charger R/T project. Includes a period-correct 440 Big Block V8 (currently disassembled for machining) and 727 Torqueflite automatic transmission. Highly solid floor and frame rails, needs rear quarter panel work.

cars.title: 1979 Volkswagen Beetle Convertible
cars.description: A delightful, highly original classic Super Beetle convertible project. Runs and drives smoothly but requires a fresh coat of paint, new soft-top vinyl, and moderate interior upholstery work. Great entry-level vintage restoration project.

messages.message: Hi, is this 1967 Corvette still available? I would like to schedule a private viewing this Saturday. I have my financing pre-arranged.
Absolutely gorgeous Shelby Cobra. Is the price firm, and can you provide the engine build details and restoration documentation? Thank you.
Hello, I am interested in negotiating a deal for the 1967 Corvette. We would love to feature this in our heritage display collection. Let me know if we can set up a custom viewing.

replies.message: Thank you for your interest in KSA Classics. Our curators are reviewing your inquiry.
